Package com.rays.common

Interface BaseServiceInt<T extends BaseDTO>

  • Type Parameters:
    T - the DTO type that extends BaseDTO
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    AttachmentServiceInt, CollegeServiceInt, ContactServiceInt, CourseServiceInt, FacultyServiceInt, MarksheetServiceInt, RoleServiceInt, StudentServiceInt, SubjectServiceInt, TimeTableServiceInt, UserServiceInt
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AttachmentServiceImpl, BaseServiceImpl, CollegeServiceImpl, ContactServiceImpl, CourseServiceImpl, FacultyServiceImpl, MarksheetServiceImpl, RoleServiceImpl, StudentServiceImpl, SubjectServiceImpl, TimeTableServiceImpl, UserServiceImpl
    public interface BaseServiceInt<T extends BaseDTO>
    Base Service Interface that defines standard business operations for all services in the application. This interface provides a contract for service layer implementations to perform CRUD operations and search functionality on DTO objects.
    Author:
    sanjana gangrade

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      long add​(T dto, UserContext userContext)
      Adds a new record to the database.
      T delete​(long id, UserContext userContext)
      Deletes a record by its primary key.
      T findById​(long id, UserContext userContext)
      Finds a record by its primary key.
      T findByUniqueKey​(java.lang.String attribute, java.lang.String val, UserContext userContext)
      Finds a record by a unique key attribute.
      long save​(T dto, UserContext userContext)
      Saves a record by either adding a new record or updating an existing one.
      java.util.List search​(T dto, int pageNo, int pageSize, UserContext userContext)
      Searches for records based on the provided DTO criteria with pagination.
      java.util.List search​(T dto, UserContext userContext)
      Searches for all records based on the provided DTO criteria without pagination.
      void update​(T dto, UserContext userContext)
      Updates an existing record in the database.

    • Method Detail

      • add

        long add​(T dto,
         UserContext userContext)
        Adds a new record to the database.
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO to add
        userContext - the user context containing current user information
        Returns:
        the ID of the newly added record

      • update

        void update​(T dto,
            UserContext userContext)
        Updates an existing record in the database.
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO to update
        userContext - the user context containing current user information

      • save

        long save​(T dto,
          UserContext userContext)
        Saves a record by either adding a new record or updating an existing one.
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO to save
        userContext - the user context containing current user information
        Returns:
        the ID of the saved record

      • delete

        T delete​(long id,
         UserContext userContext)
        Deletes a record by its primary key.
        Parameters:
        id - the primary key value of the record to delete
        userContext - the user context containing current user information
        Returns:
        the deleted DTO

      • findById

        T findById​(long id,
           UserContext userContext)
        Finds a record by its primary key.
        Parameters:
        id - the primary key value
        userContext - the user context containing current user information
        Returns:
        the found DTO, or null if not found

      • findByUniqueKey

        T findByUniqueKey​(java.lang.String attribute,
                  java.lang.String val,
                  UserContext userContext)
        Finds a record by a unique key attribute.
        Parameters:
        attribute - the name of the unique attribute
        val - the value of the unique attribute
        userContext - the user context containing current user information
        Returns:
        the found DTO, or null if not found

      • search

        java.util.List search​(T dto,
                      int pageNo,
                      int pageSize,
                      UserContext userContext)
        Searches for records based on the provided DTO criteria with pagination.
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO containing search criteria
        pageNo - the page number for pagination
        pageSize - the number of records per page
        userContext - the user context containing current user information
        Returns:
        list of matching DTOs

      • search

        java.util.List search​(T dto,
                      UserContext userContext)
        Searches for all records based on the provided DTO criteria without pagination.
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO containing search criteria
        userContext - the user context containing current user information
        Returns:
        list of matching DTOs
